mapper.select: SELECT * FROM identity WHERE IDENTITY_CARD = #{idCard} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM identity WHERE IDENTITY_STATUS = 0 ORDER BY BLACK_START_TIME DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE identity SET USER_BAN_NUM = USER_BAN_NUM + #{increment} WHERE IDENTITY_ID = #{identityId}

UPDATE identity i SET USER_BAN_NUM = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `join` j WHERE j.IDENTITY_ID = i.IDENTITY_ID AND j.JOIN_IS_CHECKIN = 3 AND j.JOIN_MEET_DAY >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') )
UPDATE identity SET IDENTITY_STATUS = 0, BLACK_START_TIME = #{startTime}, BLACK_END_TIME = #{endTime}, USER_CHECK_TYPE = 1 WHERE IDENTITY_STATUS = 1 AND USER_BAN_NUM > 5
UPDATE identity SET IDENTITY_STATUS = 1, USER_BAN_NUM = 0 WHERE IDENTITY_STATUS = 0 AND BLACK_END_TIME < #{now}
